case_title: SULEIMA, MOHAMMAD vs. RISSO, DAVID et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-16-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-16-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR PLAINTIFF: IF NO APPEARANCE AND/OR NO GOOD CAUSE COURT WILL DISMISS CASE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-12-1996 CONTINUED FROM FEB-16-1996 TO MAR-18-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SULEIMA, MOHAMMAD AS TO DEFENDANT RISSO, DAVID DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-26-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-24-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-06-1995
